install.title: Initialize XBoard
install.subtitle: Create your admin account to get started
install.success: Admin account created successfully, redirecting to login...
install.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
install.hint: You can login with either email or username, at least one is required
install.agentDeployHint: After initialization, generate the one-click deploy command in Admin. Agents use the shared first token only for initial registration, then automatically switch to a host-specific token.
install.agentDiagnosticsHint: The installer shows OS, architecture, init system, package manager, release version, checksum result, connectivity warnings, and failed-stage log hints.

auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Reset your account password with email verification
auth.forgotPasswordCodeSent: Verification code sent to your email
auth.forgotPasswordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully, please login again

settings.subtitle: Manage your account
settings.resetTokenHint: This will invalidate your current subscription URL

agents.title: Server Probe
agents.emptyDescription: Add your first agent to start monitoring your nodes
agents.name: Node Name

deploy.title: One-Click Deploy Command
deploy.description: Run this command on target machines to install and connect Agent. The same command can be reused for batch deployment.
deploy.tokenModel: The communication key is only the shared first token for initial Agent registration. After registration succeeds, each Agent automatically exchanges it for a host-specific token and no longer depends on the shared first token.
deploy.diagnosticsDescription: The script prints checks before it changes service state, so failures are easier to locate.
deploy.diagnosticsPlatform: Shows OS, architecture, init system, package manager, and required commands.
deploy.diagnosticsConnectivity: Runs warning-only port and gRPC connectivity preflight checks.
deploy.diagnosticsRelease: Displays release channel, version, asset name, and checksum verification result.
deploy.diagnosticsFailure: Reports the failed stage with log hints for quick recovery.
deploy.diagnosticsToken: No per-Agent install token or --host-token is generated, so the same command stays batch-friendly.
deploy.missingAddress: Agent endpoint address is not configured. Please set it in System Settings -> Node Communication first.
deploy.missingCommunicationKey: Communication key is unavailable. Please check System Settings -> Node Communication.

cores.title: Agent Cores
cores.subtitle: Manage core instances and switches
cores.emptyDescription: No core information reported from this agent.
cores.instancesEmptyDescription: Create a core instance to start proxy services.
cores.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{coreType}} ({{instanceId}})?
cores.fieldsRequired: Core type and instance ID are required
cores.switchFieldsRequired: Source instance and target core are required
cores.operationsEmptyDescription: Submitted create / switch / install tasks will appear here.
cores.operationsPolling: Active operations detected. The panel is refreshing automatically.
cores.timelineDescription: Shows historical step logs and appends realtime logs while the operation is running.
cores.timelineEmptyDescription: Select an operation to view step logs reported by Agent.
cores.busyTitle: Agent is busy with another operation
cores.busyDescription: This Agent already has an active install, switch, or config apply task. Wait for it to finish, then retry.
cores.versionStatusDescription: View local/remote versions, status, and check errors for Agent and core binaries.
cores.versionEmptyDescription: Version status appears after Agent reports binaries.
cores.updatePanelDescription: Check for new Agent versions, submit update tasks, and review health confirmation, rollback, and locked-version state.
cores.updateActiveDescription: An Agent update task is running. Wait for it to finish before submitting another task.
cores.updateEmptyDescription: Run an update check or update to show recent tasks and timeline logs here.
cores.updateTargetPlaceholder: Leave blank to let backend choose the remote version
cores.queuePanelDescription: Shows Agent command queue capacity, active tasks, and queue_full/unsupported_action/timeout rejection states.
cores.queueStatsEmptyDescription: Capacity, queued, and inflight counts appear after the Agent reports command queue state.
cores.queueNoRejections: No recent queue_full, unsupported_action, or timeout states.
cores.trafficPolicyDescription: Configure Agent traffic limits, threshold actions, and reset schedule.
cores.trafficThresholdHint: 0 disables threshold actions; 1-100 triggers at that percent of the limit.
cores.trafficLimitRequired: Traffic limit is required when policy is enabled.
cores.trafficThresholdInvalid: Threshold percent must be between 0 and 100.
cores.trafficResetDayInvalid: Reset day must be between 1 and 31.
cores.trafficIntervalInvalid: Interval days must be greater than 0.
cores.trafficCycleDescription: Shows current cycle usage, threshold state, reset schedule, and counter trust.
cores.trafficCountersUntrustedHint: This Agent has not reported trusted boot/raw counters yet. Traffic totals are hidden until reliable counters arrive.
cores.trafficResetConfirm: Reset this Agent traffic cycle now? Threshold state and related filter reasons will be cleared.
cores.logsEmptyDescription: No log entries match the current filters.

applyRuns.textDescription: Drill down with text diff by tag or filename

diff.description: Compare Desired and Applied text and semantic differences

snapshot.description: View inventory files and inbound index reported by agents

xhttp.title: XHTTP Transport
xhttp.description: Edit Xray streamSettings.network and xhttpSettings without replacing advanced JSON fields.
xhttp.disabledHint: Select xhttp as the Xray transport to edit xhttpSettings. Existing xhttpSettings are preserved when another transport is selected.
xhttp.headersHint: Use the Host field above instead of headers.Host.
xhttp.hostHeaderWarning: headers.Host is not supported here; use the XHTTP Host field.
xhttp.advancedDescription: extra, xmux, and downloadSettings are preserved as JSON objects.
xhttp.streamOneDownloadWarning: downloadSettings cannot be used when mode is stream-one.

empty.noHostDescription: Select a host to manage config center resources.
empty.noSpecDescription: Create your first spec to manage desired config.
empty.noApplyRunDescription: Create an apply run to inspect status and diagnostics here.
empty.noApplyTextDiff: No text diagnostics available for the current selector
empty.selectApplyTextDiff: Enter a tag or filename to inspect run-level text diagnostics
empty.selectTextDiffSelector: Text diff requires a tag or filename
empty.noDriftDescription: Desired and Applied are currently aligned.
empty.noInventoryDescription: Agent has not reported config inventory yet.
empty.noInboundIndexDescription: Agent has not reported inbound index yet.
empty.noHistoryDescription: This spec has no revision history yet.

messages.invalidTargetRevision: Target revision must be a number greater than 0

system.title: System Settings
system.comingSoonDesc: System settings feature is under development

subscription.sourceManagementDescription: Manage imported subscriptions and custom nodes used when building user subscriptions.
subscription.sourceDialogDescription: Choose a source type and provide only the required material for that source.
subscription.sourceEmptyDescription: Add imported subscriptions or custom nodes to make them available in subscription output.
subscription.sourceUrlHint: The table only shows a masked summary of this URL.
subscription.sourceEnabledHint: Disabled sources are excluded from subscription output.
subscription.sourceSyncUnknownError: Sync completed with an unknown error
subscription.filterDiagnosticsDescription: Inspect available node counts, filtered nodes, and recent exclusion reasons.
subscription.recentFilteredNodesHint: Only recent reasons are shown here; subscription output does not expose these details.
subscription.filtersEmptyDescription: No nodes have been excluded by the current filters.

tooltips.mode: Select when to reset traffic usage
tooltips.day: Traffic resets on this day of each month

settings.title: System Settings
settings.description: Manage site, subscription, node, email, and routing settings

tooltips.forceHttps: Force all requests to use HTTPS
tooltips.subscribePath: Changing this will invalidate old subscription links
tooltips.resetCron: Use cron expression to set reset schedule
tooltips.allowChange: Allow users to update subscription info
tooltips.injectMeta: Include traffic and expiry info in subscriptions
tooltips.injectProtocol: Include protocol and version info in subscriptions
tooltips.communicationKey: Only a masked value is shown by default. Reveal and reset actions are audited.
tooltips.communicationKeyRegistration: This key is only used for initial Agent registration. After registration, Agents automatically exchange it for a host-specific token; resetting the shared key does not affect registered Agents.
tooltips.agentGrpcAddress: Agent gRPC target address used in one-click deploy command
tooltips.alertTrafficEnabled: Notify when traffic exceeds the threshold

messages.revealAudit: Reveal actions are audited. Use this only when copying deployment commands or diagnosing registration issues.
messages.resetImpact: Reset only affects future first registrations. Agents that already exchanged a host-specific token keep using their own token.
